service.name: Google Gemini API
service.description_for_ai: Google Gemini AI models. Most generous free tier of any frontier AI API. Gemini 2.5 Flash is fast and cheap, Gemini 3.1 Pro is the flagship. Supports text, vision, audio, video, and code. 1M+ token context window. Use when cost matters or for multimodal tasks involving video/audio.

auth.how_to_get: Get key instantly at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey — free
auth.cost: Free tier: 1500 req/day for Gemini 2.5 Flash. Paid: $0.30/$2.50 per 1M tokens for 2.5 Flash

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate text using Gemini models. Supports text, images, audio, video, and documents as input. Massive 1M-token context window. Best free tier of any frontier AI.

contents.description: Array of {role, parts} where parts can be text, image, video, audio

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create text embeddings using Gemini Embedding model. For semantic search and RAG.

agent_hints.free_tier: Gemini 2.5 Flash is free for 1500 requests/day — ideal for development and low-volume production.
agent_hints.model_choice: gemini-2.5-flash for most tasks (free tier). gemini-2.5-pro when you need stronger reasoning. gemini-3.1-pro for production frontier tasks.
agent_hints.multimodal: Gemini natively handles images, audio, video — pass them as inline_data with base64. No separate endpoint needed.
agent_hints.context_window: 1M token context = ~750,000 words = entire book. Use for processing large documents.
